ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(StageName),
NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,"Feature Update")) , Probability >= 0.25, RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfCa', /*Panel Acquisition*/ $Profile.Id <> '00eb0000000oBvcAAE', $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Partnership",
isblank(text(Product_Sold__c )),
NOT(ISCHANGED(Related_Meeting__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(SalesLoft1__Most_Recent_Cadence_Name__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Account_owner_changed__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(DocuSign_Envelope_Status__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Legal_Request_Status__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Quote_Request_Status__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Supplier_Questionnaire_Request_Status__c)),
OR( ISBLANK( What_are_the_Before_Scenarios__c ), ISBLANK( What_are_the_After_Scenarios__c ) , ISBLANK( What_are_the_Customer_s_Metrics__c ) , ISBLANK( text(Primary_Use_Case__c) ) , ISBLANK( What_is_their_main_pain__c ) , ISBLANK( Positive_Business_Outcome__c ) , ISBLANK( How_do_we_solve_it__c ), ISBLANK(text( Product_Sold__c ))
) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please make sure that the following are fields are populated before moving to 25% or more: Primary Use Case, Product Sold - Base Product and the fields in the Discovery Guide section
